title: Alchemical Infusions
description: More interesting and dynamic way to create and use potions and enchantments.
body:
# Alchemical Infusions
## Redesign of alchemy & enchanting in minecraft

![alchemical infusions logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d24c17cca4f9a585dea82768a02f035e9b7fa0f.png)

_This mod adds 2 blocks, which recipes will be unlocked in your recipe book with the obtaining of an iron ingot._



Firstly, Alchemical Infusions adds the Alchemy set to make potion crafting fast & effective as well as push the possibility of potion combinations, levels & durations to a more useful level.

![visual explanation of each slot in the alchemy set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3336c410d88416b824f9feef8e66a39edeae3a3.png)

- Input Slots (blue)
- Output Slot (red)
- Fuel Slot (orange)

**Fuel:**
- Sticks
- Click the Fuel slot with Flint and Steel to initiate the recipe 

_Ingredients are items that have been assigned potion effects to descriptions, which otherwise would not have them (like tulips, saplings etc.)_

_Splash & Lingering bottle variants have also been added, which you can make simply by cycling them in a crafting table with the vanilla glass bottle._

**Potion Creation:**
- Put 2 ingredients with shared effect into the input slots
- Put an empty bottle of your choice into the output slot
- Ignite

**Potion Distillation:** _(To increase potency at cost of duration)_
- Put a potion into the output slot
- Ignite

**Potion Prolongation:**
- Put a potion into the output slot (only base potency works)
- Put an ingredient with shared effect into an input slot
- Ignite

**Potion Combination:**
- Put 2 potions into the input slots
- Put an empty bottle of your choice into the output slot
- Ignite

**Arrow tipping:** _(With matching duration)_
- Put a potion into the input slot
- Put an arrow into the output slot
- Ignite

![sword on the infusion anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e2e23fd9d9d2f1c6f3cba8f09b2dc7b9650c8c7.png)

Secondarily, Alchemical Infusions adds an Infusion anvil block, which allows to apply potions directly to items to enchant them on a basic level & catalysts to increase these levels to maximum.

**Enchanting:**
- Apply a potion to an item to enchant it with the corresponding Effect → Enchantment

**Catalysts:**
- Apply catalysts to increase the level of an enchantment by 1.

_Catalysts are items that have been assigned enchantments to descriptions, which otherwise would not have them (like diamond, obsidian etc.)_

~

As of right now, a lot of the ingredients have semi-random assortment of effects, for my creativity is limited. If anyone wishes to tweak the effects / durations, I may merge it into a next version of the mod.

Alchemical Infusions also has datapack integration to make any in-game item a potion ingredient, any effect linked to any enchantment and any item to become a catalyst.

With the priority system, any higher priority .json can override entries from lower priority ones, so you can completely change the way your modpack integrates it - in theory, even modded effects and enchantments.

All you have to do is make a datapack with data/alchemy/infusions.json

[>From there you can use my own default definition as a reference and rewrite it if you like<](https://github.com/Rodrigo22Borgia/Alchemical-Infusions/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/alchemical-infusions/alchemy/infusions.json)
